# Daily Report — 2026-06-18

## Task Completed
Added `update_change_task` tool — PATCH change_task by sys_id or CTASK number.
Supports updating state, assigned_to, assignment_group, short_description, description,
planned_start_date, planned_end_date, work_notes, and close_notes.
Empty-body guard prevents no-op PATCHes. 404 guard. Date fields validated via
`validate_servicenow_datetime`. Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages.
